text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text: Oh, for goodness' sake... Why would you ever think I would want to try the "World's Smelliest Cake"?

text_block_list.name: Gold Ship
text_block_list.text:
Well, why the heck not? I thought you loved
cake, so I got this for us to share...

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text: I do love... a-ahem. I wouldn't mind a bit of normal cake, but not this monstrosity!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Classes just ended, and I see Mejiro McQueen
and Gold Ship engaging in their usual banter.
Got cold feet? I could consider bailing you out.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text: That voice...

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text: Nakayama?

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text: Oh my, thank you so much! I suppose you might enjoy whatever flavor this... thing has. And who am I to judge, quite honestly?

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text: To each her own. Feast on, I say!

text_block_list.name: Nakayama Festa
text_block_list.text:
Now hold on a minute. I never said I'd be takin' it
off your pretty little hands for free.

text_block_list.name: Nakayama Festa
text_block_list.text: How about a game?

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text: A game?

text_block_list.name: Nakayama Festa
text_block_list.text: If you win, then I eat the cake. Deal?

text_block_list.name: Gold Ship
text_block_list.text:
Count me in! You ever heard of the invincible
GolMac duo?

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text:
Now wait just a moment! Exactly why have you
included yourself?

text_block_list.name: Gold Ship
text_block_list.text:
Ey, Missy! If I didn't jump in when I did, you'd be
stuck on a one-way ride to Stinky Cheesecake
City!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text: You're the one who wanted me to eat it! For crying out loud... You're on, Nakayama! To me, Gold Ship!

text_block_list.name: Nakayama Festa
text_block_list.text:
The bliss of winning culinary ignorance or the
despair of tasting a gastronomic hellscape... Now
these are the kind of stakes I can get behind!

text_block_list.name: Nakayama Festa
text_block_list.text:
Been craving this kinda action lately, to be
honest.

text_block_list.name: Nakayama Festa
text_block_list.text:
(The will to never back down, to never fold
against all the odds!)

text_block_list.name: Nakayama Festa
text_block_list.text: (This is the attitude you need, El.)

text_block_list.name: Nakayama Festa
text_block_list.text: (That's all you're lacking)

text_block_list.name: Gold Ship
text_block_list.text: What's the matter? Afraid of a little two-on-one?

text_block_list.name: Nakayama Festa
text_block_list.text:
Not at all. I just remembered another game I've
gotta navigate. If only there was a winning hand
to play in all situations...

text_block_list.name: Nakayama Festa
text_block_list.text:
Hey, you've got a knack for strategizing with
Umamusume, right?

text_block_list.name: Nakayama Festa
text_block_list.text:
Course. How do you go about getting someone to
understand something that words can't describe?
choice_data_list: Be patient with them until they figure it out.
Try to get them to experience it?

text_block_list.name: Nakayama Festa
text_block_list.text:
Gotcha. And there's a chance they'll never figure
it out, so it's a gamble...

text_block_list.name: Gold Ship
text_block_list.text:
Okay, seems you're ready to roll. It's time for the
showdown! Bring on the heat!

text_block_list.name: Nakayama Festa
text_block_list.text:
Ahhh, I can feel my hair standin' on edge. Let's
get right to the action... Rock, paper, scissors,
shoot!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Faced with the poor odds of the two-versus-one
situation, Nakayama Festa ends up losing the
game. She's now taking her first bite of the cake.

text_block_list.name: Nakayama Festa
text_block_list.text: Munch... Hm?

text_block_list.name: Nakayama Festa
text_block_list.text:
Hey now, this ain't half-bad! Just reeks a little,
s'all.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
As luck would have it, the cake is actually to her
liking.

text_block_list.name: Nakayama Festa
text_block_list.text:
Maybe rough 'em up a little, then? Didn't figure
you for the type, but I like your style!

text_block_list.name: Nakayama Festa
text_block_list.text:
Not opposed to that approach myself. Time to
show off some REAL pro moves!

text_block_list.name: Gold Ship
text_block_list.text:
Okay, seems you're ready to roll. It's time for the
showdown! Bring on the heat!

text_block_list.name: Nakayama Festa
text_block_list.text:
Ahhh, I can feel my hair standin' on edge. Let's
get right to the action... Rock, paper, scissors,
shoot!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Faced with the poor odds of the two-versus-one
situation, Nakayama Festa ends up losing the
game. She's now taking her first bite of the cake.

text_block_list.name: Nakayama Festa
text_block_list.text: Munch... Hm?

text_block_list.name: Nakayama Festa
text_block_list.text:
Hey now, this ain't half-bad! Just reeks a little,
s'all.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
As luck would have it, the cake is actually to her
liking.
